_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of therapeutic sensitivities in a spheroid drug combination screen of Neurofibromatosis Type I associated High Grade Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: Our human NF1-HGG line was derived from a malignant astrocytoma of a 42-year-old female Neurofibromatosis Type I patient and has full loss/inactivation of NF1, ATRX, TP53 and CDKN2A
details: Has full loss/inactivation of NF1, ATRX, TP53 and CDKN2A
